description: Large gull with short wings. Larger than nearby Herring Gulls with heftier bill. Plumage rather worn. Back gray with some brownish hues, perhaps due to wear. Back color a bit darker than that if nearby Herring Gull. Greater coverts worn, and thus whitish near base, but more brownish distally. Base of terials similarly pallid, and gray-brown distally. Folded primaries (note that in photos, wings are drooped a bit, so that base of primaries more visible. This description pertains to when wings fully folded) brown centered with fairly broad pale edging. Bill hefty but relatively little gonydeal angle. Bill pink with irregular dark band near tip and small pink tip. Eye dark. Observed in flight with bright light nearly directly behind. Underside of flight feathers pearly white, with mottled underside to wing coverts. Upper wings pale gray brown with some grayish brown on outermost two or three primaries. Tail pale grayish- brown with paler rump. Head and chest white, mottled with some brown, belly more heavily mottled with brown. Legs pink.
photographer: Photographer: Mlodinow, Mlodinow, Mlodinow, Mlodinow, Mlodinow, Mlodinow
